regions.us-ports: Today in Miami, southeast winds at 11 knots will accompany persistent drizzle with an 82% rain probability, expected to impact embarkation and shore excursions significantly. Passengers and crew should prepare for ongoing wet conditions and adjust plans accordingly over the coming days.
